# buildkit_registry_image (Data Source)

Resolves an existing image reference in a registry to its digest, platforms, labels, and creation time. Uses the provider's registry credentials.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Resolve an existing image reference to its digest and metadata.

data "buildkit_registry_image" "base" {
  reference = "ghcr.io/org/app:latest"
}

output "digest" {
  value = data.buildkit_registry_image.base.digest
}

output "platforms" {
  value = data.buildkit_registry_image.base.platforms
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `reference` (String) Image reference, e.g. `ghcr.io/org/app:latest` or `ghcr.io/org/app@sha256:...`.

### Optional

- `insecure` (Boolean) Allow plain-HTTP / untrusted TLS when contacting the registry.

### Read-Only

- `created` (String) RFC3339 creation timestamp, if available.
- `digest` (String) `sha256:`-prefixed manifest digest.
- `digest_url` (String) Fully-qualified digest reference (`registry/repo@sha256:...`).
- `id` (String) Equals `digest_url`.
- `labels` (Map of String) Image config labels (single-platform images only).
- `media_type` (String) Manifest media type.
- `platforms` (List of String) Platforms present in the image (or index).
